items.summary: Rename the app from its current name to 'Shoe Swapper' everywhere it appears — including the header logo in Layout.tsx, the page title in index.html, and any other branding references across the app. Update all copy to emphasize trading/swapping over buying and selling (e.g., 'Start Trading' instead of 'Buy Now', 'Swap' language throughout).

Retheme the entire app to a red, black, and white color palette. Replace all neon/electric accent colors (orange, green, etc.) with a primary red accent (e.g., #E11D48 or similar bold red), pure black backgrounds, and white text/surfaces. Update frontend/src/index.css CSS custom properties, frontend/tailwind.config.js color tokens, and all component classes consistently so the street-culture aesthetic is preserved but expressed in red, black, and white only.

Add a 'Negotiation' tab to the main navigation (Layout.tsx) and create a new Negotiation page/route. The page should allow users to send and view simulated messages to/from other users about potential shoe trades. Use mock/demo data for conversations (no real-time backend required). Display a list of conversation threads on the left and a message view on the right. Each conversation should reference a shoe listing by name. Messages should be stored in local component state or React Query cache.

Add a trading-focused hero image to the Home page. Place the generated image (trading-hero.dim_1200x600.png) prominently in the hero section of frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx, replacing or augmenting the current hero banner background. Serve it as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/.
